title: rubus piletostachys var. albiflorus
intro: Rubus piletostachys var. albiflorus is a variant of the black raspberry plant, characterized by its white flowers and edible fruits. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus piletostachys var. albiflorus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to fight cancer cells and improve cognitive function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and dried berry extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
